name: Bridgeport Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Deegan and Hinkle Lakes Park in WV, USA! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Restrooms and water are located within the park but not immediately available at the courts, future updates plan to build these amenities at the court.

name: Buzz Henderson Center- Jewel City Church
description: Come play pickleball at Buzz Henderson Center- Jewel City Church in Meadowbrook, WV! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like wheelchair accessibility, restrooms, and water.
hours: Mon-Thur 5am-10pm Fri-Sat 5am-9pm Please Join us on Sundays for services at Jewel City Church! © 2025 Jewel City Church. All Rights Reserved.

name: Clarksburg Veterans Memorial Park
description: Newly renovated courts (Aug 2024).  9 Courts with Permanent Lines and Permanent Nets

name: Harrison County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Harrison County YMCA in Clarksburg, WV! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available.

name: Nutter Fort Park
description: Come play pickleball at Nutter Fort Park in Clarksburg, WV! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: The Bridge Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at The Bridge Sports Complex in Bridgeport, WV! There are 12 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
